hero.title: Designing digital experiences with impact
hero.subtitle: Front-End Dev & Mobile Dev specialized in creating modern, accessible and high-performance interfaces.

bio.name: My name is David Guillen
bio.age: I am 23 years old, I am a
bio.title: Front-End Dev & Mobile Dev
bio.location: currently living in Villa Crespo, Buenos Aires, Argentina. I have more than 4 years of experience creating modern, accessible and high-performance user interfaces for various companies and projects.
bio.specialization: I specialize in full-stack development with React, Preact, Redux, Next.js, Angular, Vue and Nuxt.js, as well as mobile development with React Native. I have extensive experience in backend development with Node.js, Express, Python, and database management with MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Firebase. My expertise includes UX/UI design, responsive design, and agile methodologies like Scrum and Kanban. My goal is to combine aesthetic design with clean and efficient code, following principles like SOLID, DRY, KISS and BEM to create digital experiences that impress and work perfectly.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
section1.content: By accessing and using this website, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you must not use this site.

section2.title: 2. Use of the site
section2.content: This site is a personal portfolio. You may browse freely and contact through the provided means. Use of the content without prior authorization is not permitted.

section3.title: 3. Intellectual property
section3.content: All content on this site, including texts, designs, code and displayed projects, is the property of the author. Reproduction without express consent is prohibited.

section4.title: 4. External links
section4.content: This site may contain links to external sites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those sites.

section5.title: 5. Contact
section5.content: For inquiries about these terms, you can contact me through the contact form available on this site.

section1.title: 1. Information we collect
section1.content: This site may collect information you voluntarily provide when using the contact form, such as name, email and message. We do not collect browsing data beyond what is necessary for basic site operation.

section2.title: 2. Use of information
section2.content: The information you send through the contact form is used solely to respond to your inquiry. We do not share your information with third parties or use it for marketing purposes without your consent.

section3.title: 3. Cookies and local storage
section3.content: This site may use local storage (localStorage) for preferences such as language or theme. We do not use third-party tracking cookies.

section4.title: 4. Security
section4.content: We implement reasonable measures to protect the information you provide. Communications are made through secure connections when available.

section5.title: 5. Your rights
section5.content: You may request access, correction or deletion of data you have provided by contacting me directly. If you have questions about this policy, feel free to reach out.
